description: Plan a redesigned Level 4+ proxy constraint before any implementation, with domain-balanced, boundary-aware, false-dry/false-wet paired checks.
notes: Viable only as a plan-first direction; no weight increase, loss edit, config edit, architecture edit, seed expansion, sweep, or Phase38 rescue.

option_name: Pause proxy-loss redesign and move to SWE data readiness
description: Pause proxy-loss redesign and audit data readiness for future residual-style physical constraints without claiming SWE/PINN behavior.
notes: Conservative pivot to data-readiness evidence after repeated proxy-loss trade-off limitations.

option_name: Consolidate negative result with no new training
description: Document Phase 38-39 as a useful negative result and avoid a new constraint.
notes: Scientifically valid if no immediate new direction is justified, but it does not advance the project toward richer physical evidence.

description: Defer the next-direction decision if required evidence is missing or contradictory.
notes: Used only for missing or contradictory required evidence.
